findings.summary: Review-required detector evidence forces a suite machine failure that the decision layer makes irreversible
evidence: suite.py:348 makes memorization_reviews_resolved false when review_required_count > 0
suite.py:373 exposes manual_review_required while promotion.pass remains false
promotion_decision.py:306 adds every machine failure as a hard block
promotion_decision.py:313 chooses blocked before considering cleared reviews
findings.impact: a real conclusive v2 review cannot clear review-required detector evidence for promotion

findings.summary: Detector and decision evidence-class vocabularies disagree
evidence: memorization.py emits exact_rgba_low_evidence_collision while promotion allows blank_collision and near_blank_collision
findings.observed_probe: detector class exact_rgba_nontrivial produced blocked/not_comparable with candidate pair 0 silently downgrades an exact-RGBA match

findings.summary: Promotion does not authenticate the production detector policy
evidence: promotion validates only a nonempty policy version and optional caller equality
v2 review required fields omit detector_policy_sha256

findings.summary: candidate_evidence_sha256 in a v2 review hashes only the pair object
findings.evidence: promotion_decision.py:140 compares the field to canonical_sha256(pair)
findings.observed_probe: a changed top-level candidate document returned eligible while the review hash stayed equal to the pair hash

findings.summary: Decision trusts a machine pass without semantic cross-check
findings.observed_probe: synthetic report with promotion.pass=true and review_required_count=1 returned eligible
findings.impact: internally inconsistent reports can cross the decision boundary if their file hash is correctly bound

findings.evidence: promotion_decision.py validates training decoded RGBA only when training_image_path is present

synthetic_result.interpretation: structural compatibility probe only; not semantically reproducible from suite and not an authorization
